title: Automations & Groups
excerpt:
Hi. This is a real basic question, but I don’t see an answer in Monday’s documentation, and I see nothing current posted in this community regarding automations and groups. 
Are automations associated with a board and al…

posts.author: TempletonFerrari (Joe Public)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi. This is a real basic question, but I don’t see an answer in Monday’s documentation, and I see nothing current posted in this community regarding automations and groups.

Are automations associated with a board and all groups in the board or can you set an automation just for a particular group?

Thank you.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: Automations have a board scope (all items - all groups). You can’t limit automations to a specific group.

posts.author: TempletonFerrari (Joe Public)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for the direct & unambiguous answer.

posts.author: Malachi (Malachi Allred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TempletonFerrari, with zzBots you can you can set an automation up to only trigger on a specific group. You can also make so it only updates items in a specific group as well.

If you are doing a Monday.com to Monday.com automation this is possible with our 1-Way or 2-Way Syncs.

1-Way: https://www.zzbots.com/store/mondaycom-mondaycom-1-way-sync

2-Way: https://www.zzbots.com/store/mondaycom-mondaycom-2-way-sync
